description: Analyze how changing the chart timeframe affects strategy execution frequency using NinjaTrader 8's Strategy Analyzer. Run the 'SampleMACrossover' strategy on 'AAPL' for the full year of 2024 (Jan 1, 2024 - Dec 31, 2024). Compare the 'Total # of trades' for 'Daily' bars versus 'Weekly' bars. Record the results in a text file at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\trade_frequency_report.txt, with the Daily trade count on the first line and the Weekly trade count on the second line.
